description: The SlotSegmentMesh component generates mesh data of a line between ``PointA`` and ``PointB``. This is to be used with a MeshRenderer.

fields.Radius: The radius of the line from ``PointA`` to ``PointB``
fields.PointA: The starting point of the generated line.
fields.PointB: The ending point of the generated line.

usage: Attach to a slot and then insert into a MeshRenderer. Don't forget to use a Material.
